interactions.question: Quel est mon CA de 2024 ?
interactions.sql_generated:
SELECT
    YEAR([Posting Date]) AS [Year],
    SUM([Amount]) AS [Chiffre d'affaires CA]
FROM [dbo].[Fact_CustomerPayementDetail]
GROUP BY YEAR([Posting Date])
ORDER BY [Year] DESC
interactions.response: Le Chiffre d'affaires CA est 232,993,525.42€ in 2024

interactions.question: combien le chiffre d'affaire de lanné 2025?
interactions.sql_generated:
SELECT
    YEAR([Posting Date]) AS [Year],
    SUM([Amount]) AS [Chiffre d'affaires CA]
FROM [dbo].[Fact_CustomerPayementDetail]
GROUP BY YEAR([Posting Date])
ORDER BY [Year] DESC
interactions.response: Le Chiffre d'affaires CA est -158,864,248.29€ in 2025
